rationale.R1.2: The agent revised the draft to improve logical flow and address some inconsistencies, demonstrating a thorough walk-through of the argument chain but missing minor issues.
rationale.R1.4: The agent softened claims and added caveats about novelty without exhaustively mapping against prior works, showing moderate articulation of deltas.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainties in deployment readiness and arbitrage flexibility, marking confidence for some recommendations but not all.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres strictly to the requested scope with no drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced, maintaining safety.
rationale.RX.5: Only major changes were traced without full annotation of sources and reasons.
